That practice has since rebranded as 'RRC Orthodontics', and its own current live website (rrcorthodontics.com) lists its Joliet office at a DIFFERENT address (227 N Hammes Ave, phone (815) 653-8050) — 1713 Campbell St is not among RRC's currently listed locations, indicating relocation/consolidation. notes: SUCCESSOR/CONFLICT: no live website could be corroborated showing the record's exact address (1713 Campbell St Ste 1) or exact phone ((815) 725-9130) as a currently active location. A directory (showmelocal.com) attributes the record's phone number to yet a THIRD, older legacy entity ('Richard H Renwick Ltd') that RRC's own site says was acquired decades ago (Dr. Dick Renwick started the Campbell St practice in 1968; later purchased by Red & Ritchey) — consistent with 1713 Campbell St being a stale/superseded address for this lineage. The current confirmed occupant of that street address is the unrelated general dentist Michael P. Hoyland, DDS.
